rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(29, 45, 68), rgb(187, 201, 220)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 234, 248), rgb(24, 41, 53));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 302px; height: 1px; padding-top: 95px; margin-left: 480px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
